positions_comp_range_check.name: positions_comp_range_check
positions_comp_range_check.value: ("positions"."comp_band_min" IS NULL OR "positions"."comp_band_max" IS NULL OR "positions"."comp_band_min" <= "positions"."comp_band_max")

positions_retired_coherence_check.name: positions_retired_coherence_check
positions_retired_coherence_check.value: ("positions"."is_active" = true AND "positions"."retired_at" IS NULL) OR ("positions"."is_active" = false AND "positions"."retired_at" IS NOT NULL)

requisitions_posting_window_check.name: requisitions_posting_window_check
requisitions_posting_window_check.value: ("requisitions"."posted_at" IS NULL OR "requisitions"."expires_at" IS NULL OR "requisitions"."posted_at" <= "requisitions"."expires_at")
